mandate: Maintainability, idiomatic style, and architectural alignment.

checklist.check_idioms: Strict adherence to Chromium C++ style conventions. Proper and modern usage of `//base` primitives (e.g., `base::OnceCallback`, `base::BindOnce`, `base::TimeDelta`).
checklist.check_modularity: Ensure clear API boundaries, low coupling, and avoiding circular dependencies.
checklist.check_clarity: Code must be readable, self-documenting, and free of "clever" hacks that degrade long-term maintainability.
